# GitHub Visibility Setup

Apply these in GitHub repository settings for discoverability.

## Repository Description
AI-powered Android microlearning app for context-aware 3-15 minute learning sessions.

## Website
Add your landing page, waitlist, or demo page URL.

## Social Preview
Upload a clean preview image in GitHub Settings -> General -> Social preview.
Recommended content: app wordmark + one phone mockup + tagline.
